**Subject Line:**  
⚠️ Verify Your Account Details to Prevent Unauthorized Access

Dear [Customer Name],

We have detected unusual activity on your account and would like to ensure your account remains secure. To protect your information, we kindly ask you to verify your account details by clicking on the link below:

[**Verify Account Details Now**](https://www.bank.com/verify-account)

This is an automated message and cannot be replied to directly. If you did not request this verification, please contact our Customer Support Team immediately at support@bank.com or call us at 1-800-123-4567.

Your account security is our priority. Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,  
[Bank Name]  
Customer Support Team  
[Bank Logo / Website URL]

P.S. This email is part of our security protocol to prevent unauthorized access. Do not share this link with anyone.

---
